title: gronophyllum selebicum
intro: Gronophyllum selebicum, also known as Selanganum, is a type of evergreen tree native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant's leaves, bark, and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selanganum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in digestion. Gronophyllum selebicum can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion by steeping the leaves, bark, or roots in hot water.
